dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) 100% price rise requirement translated as returns >= 1.0 (doubling = 100% return); (2) flag consolidation near the breakout high approximated by price staying above sma_20; (3) tight sideways movement (3-5 weeks, max 20% drift down) approximated by low Bollinger bandwidth indicating low volatility. Exit: breakout above upper Bollinger Band signals flag breakout completion. Stop loss set to 20% (the maximum allowed drift within the flag per author). Hold period set to 60 days (2 months) to capture the initial 100% rise plus flag formation window.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) 100% price rise requirement translated as returns >= 1.0 (doubling = 100% return); (2) flag consolidation near the breakout high approximated by price staying above sma_20; (3) tight sideways movement (3-5 weeks, max 20% drift down) approximated by low Bollinger bandwidth indicating low volatility. Exit: breakout above upper Bollinger Band signals flag breakout completion. Stop loss set to 20% (the maximum allowed drift within the flag per author). Hold period set to 60 days (2 months) to capture the initial 100% rise plus flag formation window.

source_rule_text: High, Tight Flag: A stock that doubles in price within 2 months or less, followed by a sideways consolidation (flag) lasting 3-5 weeks with price drifting down no more than 20%
